cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up. I need to track each swap step by step. Let me start by listing the initial positions: Original assignments: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in order. Let me go through each one. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. After this, Dave is right midfielder and Bob becomes cheerleader? Wait, no. Wait, original positions: Bob is right midfielder and Dave is cheerleader. So swapping them would make Dave the right midfielder and Bob the cheerleader. Right. So after first swap: - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Dave was right midfielder, Eve was goalkeeper.
